name: Cal Cunningham
subject: It's going to be close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there --
I'd like to ask you to make a contribution to our campaign, but first I think it's important to explain where we stand in this close Senate race and why we need your support now, more than ever.
The latest polls show this race in single digits -- one recent poll even shows our race TIED against Thom Tillis.
This fight will come down to a handful of votes. No doubt about it -- North Carolina doesn't do landslides.
Mitch McConnell's attack network knows that North Carolina is the "tipping point" race in the fight to control the Senate, and we expect them to spend more money here than any other Senate race.
Senator Hassan said that you're a top supporter and right now, I am really counting on you to step up, please.
[**If you understand how important this moment is for our campaign, then please donate $3 or whatever you can today. Any amount makes a tremendous difference:**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5e8/2a380d31/23519296/f0a926/2906349890/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y3VubmluZ2hhbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwODA1X01XSDRDQ19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cunningham?refcode=e20200805_MWH4CC_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Maggie Hassan and Cal Cunningham._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5e8/2a380d31/23519296/f0a927/2906349890/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y3VubmluZ2hhbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwODA1X01XSDRDQ19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UVNCOWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cunningham?refcode=e20200805_MWH4CC_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5e8/2a380d31/23519296/f0a920/2906349890/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y3VubmluZ2hhbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwODA1X01XSDRDQ19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UWlCOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cunningham?refcode=e20200805_MWH4CC_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5e8/2a380d31/23519296/f0a921/2906349890/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y3VubmluZ2hhbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwODA1X01XSDRDQ19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cunningham?refcode=e20200805_MWH4CC_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5e8/2a380d31/23519296/f0a926/2906349890/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y3VubmluZ2hhbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwODA1X01XSDRDQ19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cunningham?refcode=e20200805_MWH4CC_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
If we can stand tall against these attacks and fund this campaign the right way by relying on small donations -- as we already have -- then we can send a powerful message about the future of our country.
Thanks for stepping up.
-- Cal

name: Joe Biden
subject: I wanted to share this update personally, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I'm humbled to report that, together with the DNC, we raised $140 million in July. |
---
Peter, these are difficult times for our country, you don't need me to tell you that.

We recently found out that April, May, and June of this year was the worst period for our economy in recorded history. As the Trump administration continues to fail to confront the COVID-19 crisis, hundreds of thousands of small businesses have shut their doors, millions face rent checks and mortgage payments they can't afford to make, and countless others face the deep pain of mourning loved ones who have fallen victim to this terrible virus.

At times like this, it would be easy to give into darkness, to despair. To give up.

But that's not who we are.

In America -- and in this campaign -- we're tough, and we're resilient. We choose hope over fear. And we will not back down from the challenges facing us.

Our team of grassroots donors showed that once again last month, Peter. **I 'm humbled to report that, together with the DNC, we raised $140 million in July, with an average online donation of $34.77. 97% of our donations came from grassroots donors, chipping in whatever they could spare -- even $5 here and there.**

This puts us in an incredibly strong position leaving July, with $294 million cash on hand to put towards winning this thing.

I can't even begin to tell you how grateful I am to them and to you for your support. It means so much to our campaign. In these times of uncertainty, fear, and hardship, you're choosing to entrust this campaign with your support. That means the world to me, and I promise you I will never forget it.

Thanks to our grassroots donors, we are continuing to narrow the fundraising gap between our campaign and Donald Trump's. **Every single dollar that everyday people like you chip in is funding the advertising that will convince swing voters to support our campaign; the organizers who will help every voter safely cast their ballot on Election Day; and the movement that will _win_ this battle for the soul of America.**

August is going to be the most important month of the campaign so far, Peter: I'll be announcing my running mate, officially accepting the nomination at the Democratic convention, and starting the general election in earnest.

[So if you can afford to help us keep up our momentum at this important moment, please consider making your first donation of this campaign by chipping in $5 or whatever you can afford via the links below.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-august-nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")

I hate to ask, Peter, but I know that it would make a huge difference right now. _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Click here to express donate $5 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-august-nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $25 >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-august-nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=25&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $50 >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-august-nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $100 >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-august-nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=100&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&express_lane=true")

[Click here to express donate $250 >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-august-nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=250&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&express_lane=true")

[Click here to donate another amount >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-august-nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B3_julynumbers_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")** **To show my gratitude, I 'll be personally calling some of the donors to this email and saying thanks -- for everything you do. Because it matters, and I appreciate it, with all my heart. I really mean that.**

Be well, Peter. And thanks again.

Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e882c/2206877845/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e882b/2206877845/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e882a/2206877845/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e8829/2206877845/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e8828/2206877845/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e8827/2206877845/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e8826/2206877845/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e8825/2206877845/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e8824/2206877845/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e8823/2206877845/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e8826/2206877845/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e8822/2206877845/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e8825/2206877845/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba86/1cd0ac28/17c144e92/357e8821/2206877845/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Team Mackler
subject: Stay safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d6/18d6a294/4c7d06ab/26d7ec44/2787877436/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Hamilton County's Health Department just issued a warning of "potential COVID-19 exposure at the Lincoln Day Dinner." Last Friday, James Mackler's opponents for Tennessee's open U.S. Senate seat appeared unmasked at the widely attended political event. They've also both routinely downplayed the seriousness of the highly contagious virus and transmitted themselves across Tennessee in person in search of votes. James knows real leaders don't put their own political gain ahead of the health and safety of the people they seek to serve. And in this new crisis, we need more people like James, and fewer people like his opponents, representing us in the U.S. Senate. _**[Tomorrow is a big day, and whether or not we're able to share James' story of service with voters across the Volunteer State depends on what we do now. We have a goal to raise $20,000 for our Primary Day Fund before midnight tomorrow. If you can, please chip in today.](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d6/18d6a294/4c7d06ab/26d7ec45/2787877436/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA4MDVwbSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200805pm?refcode=jme200805pm_m_other&refcode2=107423")**_ | | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d6/18d6a294/4c7d06ab/26d7ec42/2787877436/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA4MDVwbSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200805pm?refcode=jme200805pm_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
Thanks,
Team Mackler

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate

They've also both routinely downplayed the seriousness of the highly contagious virus and transmitted themselves across Tennessee in person in search of votes. James knows real leaders don't put their own political gain ahead of the health and safety of the people they seek to serve. And in this new crisis, we need more people like James, and fewer people like his opponents, representing us in the U.S. Senate. "" | | | "" Thanks, Team Mackler | | | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com. ""

name: Barbara Bollier
subject: We can flip Kansas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Senator Rosen said I should reach out with an update, team:
**The general election in the Kansas Senate race starts today. It 's official: Democrats can win this race.**
The latest polls show that this race is competitive. Together, we can win in November.
But we're up against a far-right candidate who will have Mitch McConnell's full support. A McConnell-aligned super PAC is already spending millions in Kansas -- and the GOP and corporate special interests are about to double down in the fight to keep this crucial seat red.
**[The general election starts now -- and I need you with me in the fight to flip Kansas' Senate seat. Split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Jacky Rosen now.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d91ce/4fbb2af3/212c8dcb/5e8072dd/1875776529/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItMjAwODA1LWJvbGxpZXJtb25leWJvbWIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtMjAwODA1aV80NTQ2IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200805-bolliermoneybomb?refcode=em200805i_4546&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
When I'm in the Senate, I will work as hard as I can to expand access to affordable healthcare. I will do everything in my power to ensure we're taking urgent action on climate change, rooting out corruption and dysfunction in Washington, and fighting for good jobs and a strong economy.
But if the GOP keeps this seat, we can expect more of the same divisive hyper-partisanship we've come to expect. I believe Kansans deserve better -- that's why I need your support.
**[We can flip this seat -- but with less than three months to go until Election Day, we don't have any time to waste. Contribute $5 or whatever you can now to join me in the fight.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d91ce/4fbb2af3/212c8dcb/5e8072dd/1875776529/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItMjAwODA1LWJvbGxpZXJtb25leWJvbWIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtMjAwODA1aV80NTQ2IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200805-bolliermoneybomb?refcode=em200805i_4546&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,
Barbara Bollier

****[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d91ce/4fbb2af3/212c8dcb/5e8072dd/1875776529/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItMjAwODA1LWJvbGxpZXJtb25leWJvbWIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtMjAwODA1aV80NTQ2IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200805-bolliermoneybomb?refcode=em200805i_4546&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Will They Debate?
body:
Biden will have to finally come out of his basement and meet President Trump face-to-face... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Will They or Won't They Debate? ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-j/)
The mainstream press is at it again, highlighting polls that favor Joe Biden and practically declaring Biden the winner of the upcoming presidential election. Many Trump supporters believe that the great equalizer will be face-to-face debates, however, many in the media are already casting doubt on these already scheduled debates. In this week's blog, I discuss if these debates will actually happen and I have a follow-up from last week's blog about what happens if the Democrats win the trifecta of the House, Senate and Presidency. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [If the Democrats Win](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-d/)
We're a little less than 100 days from this year's election. People are saying, this could be the most important election of our lifetime. A bit cliche? Not this time. The reality is, the House, the Senate and the Presidency are all at stake. In this week's blog, I discuss what will happen if the Democrats sweep the election. God help us. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Major Threats to the US Across the Globe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-u/)
In this week's blog, I thought I would discuss the major challenges the United States faces across the globe. As a senior member of the House Foreign Affairs Committee, I would say that the five most problematic nations are Russia, China, Iran, North Korea and Venezuela. And in a little more than three months, the American people must decide whether it's true or not - that Joe Biden has been wrong on every major foreign policy issue in recent memory. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [We're #1](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-n/)
When it comes to obtaining PPP funding to save jobs in our congressional district, as compared to Ohio's other 15 congressional districts, we are #1 in every category. In this week's blog, I discuss some of these benefits that I have fought for and secured to help you and your family during these challenging times. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhtjhil-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

Polls close tomorrow night and we need every penny available to fund our get out the vote operations.** [DONATE NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhtukhd-ojdkijhkdh-h/) Thank you,
Team Manny

body:

[**Chip in to his campaign here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18565570/232666337/1282771135?refcode=08062020_em_su_tk_b1_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmRkYmE0My1lNWQ3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yC7zC_IiLfl6O9XJSFdTftAjFE6N7qw8H5vDffFG2nI=)_
* * *
---
Dear Friend, The southern border wall hit the news cycle again yesterday when Joe Biden said he'd halt construction and federal confiscation of private lands, preferring instead to secure the border and ports of entry with a mix of technology, personnel, and barriers where appropriate. We haven't heard much about the wall in recent months. That's because a __genuine and imminent__ threat to American lives and livelihoods emerged in the form of COVID-19. In response to the approach of women with children in strollers to our southern border, the administration pulled every lever it had at its disposal to confiscate land from Texans, expedite construction contract approvals, suspend environmental regulations, and re-allocate money appropriated by Congress for other purposes. Compare that with the incoherent and incompetent response to COVID-19, which has now killed over 158,000 Americans. Consider the fact that completing the wall is my opponent's second highest priority (his first priority is removing Nancy Pelosi as speaker). When he does address COVID-19, which is rarely, he follows the party line and tries to minimize the impact. I do not share Pete's priorities. I think you deserve better. _**[Demand Better. Pitch in now and help me beat Pete](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18565571/232666338/-1907457920?refcode=0806_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmRkYmE0My1lNWQ3LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yC7zC_IiLfl6O9XJSFdTftAjFE6N7qw8H5vDffFG2nI=).**_ _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | ONE TIME CONTRIBUTIONS | MONTHLY CONTRIBUTIONS

clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is the Democratic nominee for Congress in the 17th District. = Dear Friend, The southern border wall hit the news cycle again yesterday when Joe Biden said he'd halt construction and federal confiscation of private lands, preferring instead to secure the border and ports of entry with a mix of technology, personnel, and barriers where appropriate. We haven't heard much about the wall in recent months. That's because a genuine and imminent threat to American lives and livelihoods emerged in the form of COVID-19. In response to the approach of women with children in strollers to our southern border, the administration pulled every lever it had at its disposal to confiscate land from Texans, expedite construction contract approvals, suspend environmental regulations, and re-allocate money appropriated by Congress for other purposes. Compare that with the incoherent and incompetent response to COVID-19, which has now killed over 158,000 Americans. Consider the fact that completing the wall is my opponent's second highest priority (his first priority is removing Nancy Pelosi as speaker). When he does address COVID-19, which is rarely, he follows the party line and tries to minimize the impact. I do not share Pete's priorities. I think you deserve better. =.** If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | ONE TIME CONTRIBUTIONS | MONTHLY CONTRIBUTIONS ---|--- = | = = | = = | = = | = Thank you, and stay safe! Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Team Hagerty
subject: ICYMI: President Donald Trump: “Go Out And Vote For Bill Hagerty, He’s Going To Do An Exceptional Job”
body:
Peter,In case you missed it, President Donald Trump joined Bill Hagerty for a tele-town hall to encourage Tennesseans to get out and vote for Bill tomorrow. President Trump has endorsed Bill on multiple occasions, including [three tweets](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtkutk-fuutjhhtj-r/), for the United States Senate because Bill is the true Trump conservative.On the call, President Trump said, "Go out and vote for Bill Hagerty, he's going to do an exceptional job."**Listen to Hagerty 's Tele-Town Hall With President Trump [HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtkutk-fuutjhhtj-y/)** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtkutk-fuutjhhtj-j/) Thank you for your continued support for Bill's campaign.Be sure to get out and vote tomorrow for Bill Hagerty. If you have already voted, tell your family, friends, neighbors, coworkers and more to get out and vote for Bill - he's the only true Trump conservative in this race. We need a big victory to send Democrats a clear message: Tennessee values are conservative values.Best,

Michael Sullivan
Campaign Manager | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtkutk-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtkutk-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtkutk-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtkutk-fuutjhhtj-u/)
---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
4515 Harding Pike
Suite 110
Nashville, TN 37205

Earlier this week Barack Obama endorsed my opponent in this dead heat race...

No surprise.

After all, Max Rose has supported, time and again, the far left agenda pushed by President Obama’s surrogates in Congress that include sanctuary cities, releasing dangerous criminals from prison, stimulus checks for illegal immigrants and the impeachment of President Trump.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Team Hagerty Continues Statewide Get Out The Vote Tour
body:
**Team Hagerty Continues Statewide Get Out The Vote Tour** On Election Day eve, Bill Hagerty is continuing to travel across the state to meet conservative Tennesseans as part of his Get Out The Vote Tour. Today, Bill met and spoke with folks in East Tennessee.**It's Bristol, Baby** As the sun was rising, Bill kicked off the day in Bristol with an early morning interview. Bill spoke about the need to elect a true Trump conservative to the United States Senate. [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtihit-fuutjhhtj-r/) While on the way to Johnson City, Bill dialed into local radio stations and continued to share his conservative message with Tennesseans. In the Senate, he'll stand with President Trump and Senator Marsha Blackburn to defend the right to life, stand with our law enforcement officers, protect our Second Amendment rights, build the wall and protect our Tennessee conservative values.**Peggy Ann Bakery** Bill Hagerty joined former Lt. Governor Ron Ramsey and conservative Tennesseans for coffee and pastries at Peggy Ann Bakery in Johnson City. Bill reaffirmed his efforts to protect the right to life and to defund Planned Parenthood once and for all. Additionally, while he was in Johnson City, Bill met with WJHL to provide a quick update on the campaign heading into Election Day. [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtihit-fuutjhhtj-y/) **Way Down Yonder On The Chattanooga** After spending the morning in the Tri-Cities, Team Hagerty traveled to Hamilton County to meet and speak with even more conservative Tennesseans. He also held interviews with local radio and TV stations to encourage folks to get out and vote tomorrow! [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtihit-fuutjhhtj-j/) After a great lunch in Chattanooga, Bill headed to Knoxville for a Get Out The Vote rally! He spoke this afternoon with WOKI's Hallerin Hilton Hill about why he is running for Senate and he encouraged Tennesseans to get out and vote tomorrow.**Do You Smell What Team Hagerty Is Cookin '?**Ahead of Election Day, Bill joined hundreds of supporters for a Get Out The Vote rally in Knoxville. It was so great to see so many conservative supporters of Bill Hagerty. He reminded the crowd that he is the only candidate endorsed by President Donald Trump and he will continue to work with the President to bring our supply chains back from China and make Made in the USA the theme of our nation once again. During the rally, Bill had to step aside to host President Donald Trump for a tele-town hall who encouraged Tennesseans to get out and vote for Bill Hagerty tomorrow.**President Donald Trump: "Go Out And Vote For Bill Hagerty"**On the day before the election, President Trump joined Bill Hagerty for a get out the vote tele-town hall. On the call, President Trump reminded Tennesseans that he needed Bill in the United States Senate to hold China accountable, stop illegal immigration and ban sanctuary cities. [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtihit-fuutjhhtj-t/) After the Knoxville rally, Team Hagerty headed back to Hamilton County in preparation for Election Day. To stay up to date with Bill's Election Day activities, follow along on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram and Parler at @BillHagertyTN. | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtihit-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtihit-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtihit-fuutjhhtj-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtihit-fuutjhhtj-o/)
---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
4515 Harding Pike
Suite 110
Nashville, TN 37205
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-phtihit-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-b) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-u-phtihit-fuutjhhtj-n/)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: One Week Away to End Walz' Powers
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **We're one week away from Tyrant-in-the-Making Walz extending his emergency powers for the sixth month in a row. If you've lost count, we're now on Day 146 of slowing the spread.** Since this whole thing started, we've seen our favorite restaurants and businesses get shut down by one person calling all the shots. In some cases, life dreams were crushed as the shutdown led to business owners having to close their doors permanently. Now one person is mandating that all citizens wear a mask when in public. Even though there's a law on the books that prohibits the wearing of face coverings. One thing is for sure: Governor Walz and Democrats hate democracy and prefer a system of government where one person makes all the rules. Well, as long as its their own "benevolent" dictator that is. That's why Action 4 Liberty has led the effort against Governor Walz' Unilateral Emergency Powers since **Day 1**. **Here's a Recap of our Efforts:**
* **April 14 - only 15 Republicans voted with us**
* **April 28 - after weeks of pressuring House Republicans, we got all 59 to vote with us**
* **June 13 - after pressuring the Senate Republicans, we got them to pass the Resolution and we got 61 votes in the House with 2 Democrats**
* **July 14 - we got 63 votes in the House with 4 Democrats joining us**

Remember, we need 68 votes on the Resolution in the Minnesota House to finally End Walz' Powers. **So, we're merely FIVE DEMOCRATS AWAY from ending Walz' emergency powers once and for all!** It's time we **turn up the heat**! Action 4 Liberty has started a multifaceted campaign against targeted Democrats to force them to vote the right way...or else suffer in November's election. We're employing digital ads, mailers, phone calls, emails, and even this commercial in their districts: [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_tabke_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away&n=2) We also sent your signed petition to these targeted Democrats so they know that their voters want to End Walz' Powers NOW! Walz has completely abused his emergency powers to infringe on our civil liberties and shut down our favorite businesses. **Governor Walz is power hungry. Allowing one person to make rules that govern free people is the most un-American ideal that exists. He MUST BE STOPPED!** We're putting a lot of money into these targeted districts and are close to hitting our total budget to put **MAXIMUM HEAT**!
## Only $5,000 Away From Hitting Our Budget
## [PLEASE HELP US GET THERE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away&n=3)
The Legislature will be back in session in one week and we can't afford to not put**maximum pressure** on the remaining Democrats needed to End Walz' Emergency Powers. We have a shot at finally stopping Walz in his tracks! Help us get these commercials out to tens of thousands of voters in these districts by donating today. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away&n=5)
---
We must **turn up the heat** on these Democrats to stop protecting Walz! Who knows what next week has in store for our suffering state under Walz' failed leadership.
[**Only with your support of funding these commercials, other cutting edge digitals, mail and all your activism can we make this a reality. Pitch in $100 NOW if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or get us a lot of air play with a generous donation of $1,000.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away&n=6)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=only_5k_away&n=9), software for leaders.

body:
Multi-millionaire Vern Buchanan has no business taking out a loan meant for hard working small business owners who have been impacted by the pandemic -- the loans were meant to save jobs, not pad Vern’s pockets.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18571126/232755168/-940294256?refcode=080620-es-term-limits-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk2M2U5Mi0wMWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9NSA8BVqR2IVF0rTQl8L7xKyiGBjYj3_rzM7Z9GFww=&emci=36963e92-01d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=39963e92-01d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=9814644)
Friend,

While Margaret Good does what she says she will do, you can’t say the same for her opponent, Vern Buchanan.

Whether it’s protecting Social Security and Medicare, lowering drug prices, or protecting our environment, Vern Buchanan says one thing and does the opposite.

**Almost FOURTEEN years ago, Vern even advocated for TWELVE year term limits for members of Congress. Guess what? He’s overstayed his welcome. He knows it and we do, too.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18571128/232755171/1073285021?refcode2=39963e92-01d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emci=36963e92-01d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=39963e92-01d8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&refcode=080620-es-term-limits-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk2M2U5Mi0wMWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9NSA8BVqR2IVF0rTQl8L7xKyiGBjYj3_rzM7Z9GFww=) We know Vern doesn’t keep his promises, but now you can help us force him to stay true to his word by helping us defeat him in this election.

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Burning Bibles
body:
Peter,
Do you know what happened this weekend in the streets of Portland? Left-wing radicals burned a stack of Bibles. Yes, Bibles.
And do you know what is now officially less than 3 months away? Election Day.
**I can't think of two single facts that should spur us to action more so than these.**
Look, I know full well that politicians will not solve the major crises facing our culture, but an election is a statement of what kind of society we wish to be. We’ll either empower people who understand the need for God and biblical values, or people who believe His word should play second fiddle to the decrees of government bureaucrats.
I prefer the latter, and no organization is working harder to fulfill this vision than My Faith Votes. They’ve been launching an endless stream of new initiatives, most recently Our Church Votes, which is providing churches with the resources to prepare their congregations for November.
**And so, with less than 3 months to go until Election Day,** **[please](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200716apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200806apl01&n=1)**[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200716apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200806apl01&n=2)**[help us approach the finish line in as strong a fashion as possible by making a donation to My Faith Votes.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200716apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200806apl01&n=3)**
If you’re wondering if you as one person can make a difference, reflect for a moment on Orlando Magic basketball player forward Jonathan Isaac. As every one of his fellow NBA players kneeled for the national anthem last week, he stood and prayed. Explaining his belief in the gospel over symbolic shows of unity, he said “Everyone is made in the image of God and we all fall short of God’s glory.”
To me, this is the embodiment of courage. And while we may not see it on the news, I know his example of following one’s convictions will inspire countless others across this country.
So when you see people burning Bibles in Portland, remember \-- they know not what they do. The power to drive change lies within us, if we only have the courage to act.
**Thank you for your ongoing support of My Faith Votes, and with our eyes on November 3, let’s keep our foot on the gas and continue fighting for our convictions.**
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200806apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200806apl01&n=4)
United. We Stand.
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200806apl01&n=5)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200806apl01&n=6).

name: Team Warner
subject: Restore the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek, this is unacceptable.

On August 6, 1965, the _Voting Rights Act_ was passed to end discriminatory voting practices. This important law made sure that Black Americans and other voters of color were not denied their right to participate in our democratic process.

Unfortunately, this act was gutted by a 2013 Supreme Court decision, which allowed voter suppression to run rampant. This has taken the form of states enacting strict voter ID laws, purging voter rolls, shutting down polling stations, and more. And we've already seen hours-long lines to vote on primary day in Georgia and Kentucky this year.

This is making it harder for everyone to vote -- especially people of color. **Enough is enough.**

In honor of Rep. John Lewis, who put his body on the line to secure equal voting rights for all -- and with the most important election of our lifetimes just a few months away -- it's critical that Congress act NOW to block discriminatory voting practices.

**[Join us in demanding that Congress restore the Voting Rights Act immediately.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db6d/53d9897e/5408812b/1c8829dd/2907269005/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/Restore-the-Voting-Rights-Act/?code=Warner&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-vrapetition")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db6d/53d9897e/5408812b/1c8829dc/2907269005/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200806_p_1_fl__694__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db6d/53d9897e/5408812b/1c8829db/2907269005/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Amanda Sherman, MJ Hegar HQ
subject: November 4th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
What's it going to be like to wake up the day after the election?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e66/7f51f7bc/40e4d760/4ef79b6e/3651414490/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **[HELP ELECT MJ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e66/7f51f7bc/40e4d760/4ef79b6d/3651414490/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.1nd__1858__&amount=10")** Peter -- Picture this. You wake up on November 4th. You check the news and see that Sen. Cornyn has been re-elected for his fourth term in office. Mitch McConnell is still the Senate Majority Leader, and you know that nothing will get past his desk. No action on health care, gun violence, climate change -- nothing. You feel miserable, knowing that we're in for another six years of incompetence and corruption. You wish you had done more, but it's too late. **Scary, right? But it doesn 't have to happen that way if you [take action now!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e66/7f51f7bc/40e4d760/4ef79b6d/3651414490/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.1nd__1858__&amount=10")** Now picture this instead: It's November 4th and you wake up full of joy because _we did it_! MJ is our next senator and we've flipped the Senate! MJ will be in the Senate soon, working on legislation to protect our health care, combat climate change, and so much more! And this is _your_ win -- because [**you chipped in what you could**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e66/7f51f7bc/40e4d760/4ef79b6d/3651414490/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.1nd__1858__&amount=10") to help this team reach its ultimate goal: winning Texas.

So which will it be, Peter? I know I want to wake up in a world with Senator MJ Hegar, which is why I'm fighting as hard as I can. But I need -- MJ needs -- you on our side.

**Don 't wake up on November 4th wishing you'd done more. [Pitch in today to give MJ the win!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e66/7f51f7bc/40e4d760/4ef79b6d/3651414490/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.1nd__1858__&amount=10")** Amanda Sherman
Communications Director
MJ for Texas

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e66/7f51f7bc/40e4d760/4ef79b6d/3651414490/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.1nd__1858__&amount=10")**

---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e66/7f51f7bc/40e4d760/4ef79b6c/3651414490/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1858&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e66/7f51f7bc/40e4d760/4ef79b63/3651414490/VEsO/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Joe Biden
subject: A personal invitation for you to meet my running mate
body:
As soon as she joins the campaign, she'll want to hear directly from the grassroots supporters like you who have powered our campaign since Day 1. |
---
Peter --

I'm almost ready to make one of the biggest announcements of this entire campaign: picking the woman who will serve as my running mate and the next Vice President of the United States.

I know that as soon as she joins the campaign, she'll want to hear directly from the grassroots supporters who have powered our campaign since Day 1, Peter. [**So I 'd like to personally invite you to join me and my running mate for our first grassroots fundraiser together as the official Democratic ticket.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nd-full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nd-full")

[**A donation of any amount via the buttons or link below -- even just $5 -- will secure your ticket to the event:**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nd-full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nd-full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| [Other ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nd-full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nd-full")
---
**We 'll be following up with everyone who RSVPs, and sending you the exact date, time, and all the other details once they're finalized, but I didn't want to wait on giving you the opportunity to reserve your spot at this historic event.**

These grassroots fundraisers are one of my favorite parts of this campaign, Peter, and I'm especially excited for this one. I love talking directly with supporters like you about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what's at stake in this election.

And I can't wait to bring my running mate into that conversation, and introduce her to the supporters like you who have built this movement, and who will power us to victory in November.

Month after month, grassroots donations from supporters like you have made up nearly all of my campaign's donations, and I'm so proud of that fact. These contributions allow us to hire new organizers, expand our advertising, and build a campaign that will beat Trump on Election Day. Now, as we approach the home stretch of this campaign, I'll need your support more than ever for my campaign and Democrats down the ballot.

[**So I hope that you 'll join me and my running mate for our upcoming grassroots fundraiser, Peter, by making your first donation to our campaign and Democrats up and down the ballot today. Anything you can give right now will reserve your spot -- and believe me, you won't want to miss it:**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nd-full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nd-full")

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Running-Mate-Grassroots-Fundraiser**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nd-full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nd-full")

I'll get back to you on the time, the date, and yes, the running mate, but you should go ahead and get your ticket now before it fills up!

Thank you, Peter, for everything. I'm really looking forward to seeing you there.

Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba94/1cd0ac28/17c55e006/357e941f/1442615873/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba94/1cd0ac28/17c55e006/357e941e/1442615873/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba94/1cd0ac28/17c55e006/357e941d/1442615873/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba94/1cd0ac28/17c55e006/357e941c/1442615873/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba94/1cd0ac28/17c55e006/357e941b/1442615873/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba94/1cd0ac28/17c55e006/357e941a/1442615873/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba94/1cd0ac28/17c55e006/357e9419/1442615873/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba94/1cd0ac28/17c55e006/357e941a/1442615873/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._
clean_body: As soon as she joins the campaign, she'll want to hear directly from the grassroots supporters like you who have powered our campaign since Day 1. | Peter -- I'm almost ready to make one of the biggest announcements of this entire campaign: picking the woman who will serve as my running mate and the next Vice President of the United States. I know that as soon as she joins the campaign, she'll want to hear directly from the grassroots supporters who have powered our campaign since Day 1, Peter. "" "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" We 'll be following up with everyone who RSVPs, and sending you the exact date, time, and all the other details once they're finalized, but I didn't want to wait on giving you the opportunity to reserve your spot at this historic event. These grassroots fundraisers are one of my favorite parts of this campaign, Peter, and I'm especially excited for this one. I love talking directly with supporters like you about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what's at stake in this election. And I can't wait to bring my running mate into that conversation, and introduce her to the supporters like you who have built this movement, and who will power us to victory in November. Month after month, grassroots donations from supporters like you have made up nearly all of my campaign's donations, and I'm so proud of that fact. These contributions allow us to hire new organizers, expand our advertising, and build a campaign that will beat Trump on Election Day. Now, as we approach the home stretch of this campaign, I'll need your support more than ever for my campaign and Democrats down the ballot. "" "" I'll get back to you on the time, the date, and yes, the running mate, but you should go ahead and get your ticket now before it fills up! Thank you, Peter, for everything. I'm really looking forward to seeing you there. Joe | | "" "" "" "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

clean_body: almost there = | | Friend, we’re only $907 away from meeting our adjusted metrics and getting our campaign growth plans back on track. We need your help to get us to that point. | = = Friend, We set our July fundraising goal with the hope that, if we reached those goals, we’d be able to put our campaign on the best path forward for the next few months. And while we didn’t reach our July goal, we can still make that happen and make the critical investments necessary to win this fight in November. Friend, this isn’t just a fight to flip TX-22 blue. It’s a fight for expanding health care, rebuilding our economy, and restoring American leadership on the world stage. It’s a fight for our community, our families, and each other. Sri knows firsthand what those fights entail, because he’s dedicated his life to public service. That’s the kind of values-driven leadership our district needs -- and it’s the kind of leadership our district can have, if we fight as hard as we can for it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Team Sri Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | = Bringing true representation to TX-22. name: Jon Ossoff (personal)
subject: Friend, Mitch McConnell is freaking out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
He's pouring millions into Georgia to help Perdue. |
---
**Friend, Mitch McConnell's super PAC just committed another $6 MILLION to bail out my opponent, Senator David Perdue.** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2096/5b2c1286/3e6a34d7/25f1cfd6/4114998145/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_06_gop_ad_blitz?refcode=em_2020_08_06_gop_ad_blitz") **_McConnell's Senate Leadership Fund PAC is dropping $6.6 MILLION on TV and radio in Georgia \-- _the largest slice out of the $21 million they're spending in battleground states against Democrats!__**

Friend, Mitch McConnell and his crooked mega-donors know David Perdue's campaign is a _sinking ship_.

**Last week, Perdue's campaign was caught doctoring a photo of my face in one of his ads in an obvious and outrageous anti-Semitic attack -- just days after a poll came out showing me in the lead.**

**Our momentum is off the charts, and Republicans will do *anything* to stop me.**

**__But with your help, friend, we will win this race.____**

**[Let's fight corruption, incompetence, and anti-Semitism. Pitch in $10 right now>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2096/5b2c1286/3e6a34d7/25f1cfd9/4114998145/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_06_gop_ad_blitz?refcode=em_2020_08_06_gop_ad_blitz&amount=10")**

---
**Friend -- unlike David Perdue,_I'm not accepting contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists._**

**I'm counting on grassroots supporters (like you, friend!) to help stand up to Mitch McConnell when he decides to drop MILLIONS to boost my opponent.**

**The GOP has already committed about $30 MILLION (so far) to stop me.**

**[So please pitch in $5, $10 or ANY amount NOW so we can show Mitch McConnell what our people-powered movement looks like.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2096/5b2c1286/3e6a34d7/25f1cfd6/4114998145/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_06_gop_ad_blitz?refcode=em_2020_08_06_gop_ad_blitz")**

With less than 90 days before Election Day, there’s still a lot of work we need to do to unseat our opponent, the turncoat Congressman Jeff Van Drew.
Van Drew has a huge cash-on-hand advantage, the Trump fundraising machine, and big corporate donors in his corner.

body:
This is huge news for our campaign, and I couldn’t be more fired up. I started writing this email as soon as I heard — I just had to let our biggest | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/10276a5dcf8c/how-we-flip-the-house-2088318?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=1b8701a869&e=f1831b4ca2)

| Friend,

_I’m honored to announce that I’ve been elevated to the highest tier of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s (NRCC) Young Guns program!_

This is huge news for our campaign, and I couldn’t be more fired up. I started writing this email as soon as I heard — I just had to let our biggest grassroots supporters know about the big announcement.

The Young Guns program is a big deal. Only the most competitive campaigns get named to this list, and it proves that we’re on track to turn our district red in November. We’re closing down on my opponent, and the next couple of months are going to be absolutely critical to the success of our campaign.

**It means the world to me to have the support of Republican leadership, but that won’t be enough by itself. **

I need the support of grassroots donors like you to make sure we send my progressive opponent packing on November 3rd. Will you help me keep my momentum surging by donating any amount right now? Use the link below.

[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-2088318/young-guns/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=8550d0d531&e=f1831b4ca2)

Thank you for all you do,

Nancy Mace

name: U.S. Postal Service Alert
subject: urgent update: post offices in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Things are not looking good.
| | |
---
**BREAKING NEWS: U.S. Postal Service on track to go bankrupt by September - unless we take action NOW!**
|
---
The U.S. Postal Service is in crisis, friend.

**Officials warn that without emergency funding, post offices across the country - including in Georgia - will be forced to shutter. And _600,000_ hardworking employees could lose their jobs.**
The Postal Service is one of our nation's oldest, most vital institutions: Millions of Americans depend on it for access to lifesaving medication, Social Security benefits, groceries - and critically, mail-in ballots.
But in the midst of this public health crisis, the Trump administration _refuses_ to take action to save the Postal Service. Instead, they're working as hard as they can to sabotage mail delivery and DESTROY it for good.
That's why we need to speak up IMMEDIATELY and demand Congress save the U.S. Postal Service before it's too late. **We need another 85 concerned Democrats from Georgia to sign our urgent petition by midnight - but time is running out before our crucial midnight deadline.**
**[Please, friend: Add your name by midnight to DEMAND Congress save the U.S. Postal Service!](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/Save-the-US-Postal-Service?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-usps%3Fcode%3Djtk571-ja-nd")**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/Save-the-US-Postal-Service?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-usps%3Fcode%3Djtk571-ja-nd")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: ‘Only a Safe, Effective Vaccine Will Get Our Approval’
body:
The framework in the United States to support a covid-19 vaccine is now in place. Testing is underway and manufacturing capacity is rapidly expanding | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=072fd7957c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **‘Only a Safe, Effective Vaccine Will Get Our Approval’**

“The framework in the United States to support a covid-19 vaccine is now in place. Testing is underway and manufacturing capacity is rapidly expanding. But let’s be clear: The development effort must adhere to standards that will ensure any covid-19 vaccine’s safety and effectiveness,” FDA Commissioner Dr. Stephen Hahn writes in _The Washington Post_.

“Large-scale clinical trials already have begun for several promising vaccine candidates.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=444f1f422a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| According to independent journalist Michael Tracey, “mainstream media outlets have failed the public by declining to spotlight the devastation left behind by rioters in cities across America,” Yael Halon reports. Tracey said the damage he witnessed is “beyond anything I understand to have happened in the United States since at least the 1960s, and perhaps earlier.” Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bef9e1dcc4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Gov. Doug Ducey drew praise for Arizona’s coronavirus response during a visit to the White House on Wednesday . . . Many key metrics about the severity of Arizona’s pandemic, including coronavirus-related hospitalizations, are the lowest they’ve been in weeks following a surge in June and July,” Danny Shapiro reports for [KTAR News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ccff6b4d8&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A recent study of Washington, D.C., journalists’ Twitter usage found that those who cover the federal government have locked themselves away in ‘microbubbles’ where they primarily talk only to each other. The study suggests that reporters in the nation’s capital ‘may be even more insular than previously thought.’” Read more from Becket Adams in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d27a174b2&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6eb1d52f95&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1af52e0365&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=48e041cfe5)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: [Emergency Fund] Stop the Democrat Machine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress |
body:
My campaign team has just received word that Donna Shalala’s campaign is in a tailspin, and she’s struggling to keep up with us! name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Building a Better Future for our Small Businesses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
_**Building a Better Future for our Small Businesses**_

Houston has always been a city of opportunity. For generations, entrepreneurs from across the country have flocked to Houston because of our welcoming business atmosphere. Evidence of their success can be seen on street corners throughout the city. From incredible restaurants to small family accounting firms and everything in between, Houston continues to buzz with energy and opportunity. That is the story of our city and it’s the story of our businesses. In fact, Houston is one of the most economically vibrant cities in the country and we have led the country in small business outlook for years.

We all know the importance of oil and gas to our economy, but small businesses play a critical role as well. Our robust economy is filled with success stories of entrepreneurs building businesses through hard work and grit. In fact, around 99% of businesses in Texas are small businesses, and small businesses employ nearly half of our workforce. Needless to say, the city of Houston has cultivated an environment in which hardworking people can thrive and build the businesses of their dreams. And, we all reap the benefits.

Recently, we have all felt the consequences and economic disruption of the coronavirus lockdowns. And the lifeblood of our economy, our small businesses, is hurting. Many business owners are experiencing unprecedented declines in demand, and the damages are acute. I believe that we must work together to bring back opportunity and stability for the many small businesses that make Houston an incredible place to work and live.

**Through ingenuity and responsible fiscal policies, we can revive our small businesses and restore hope and opportunity to our communities.**

I am proud to announce my policy platform to protect small businesses and ensure they continue to prosper.

1. **Secure financial support** **for small businesses** – Houstonians have done their part to slow the spread of the coronavirus. Notably, we have closed our businesses and stayed home. Now, it is vital that the government provide our businesses with the financial resources they need to recover and safely build back stronger than ever. We need to provide our businesses with flexible loans that allow business owners to spend their money on their most pressing needs, without the burden of proscriptive government instructions on the allocation of resources. Our businesses are as diverse as the people who own and operate them, and we must empower them to make the choices they need to continue to support the millions of Texans they employ.

2. **Liability protections to help businesses open safely** – The coronavirus has shifted the way many businesses operate, and certain industries may need to accommodate long-term changes. The government should be facilitating this transition, not getting in the way. Our government should collaborate with business owners to develop solutions that work in real time, keep customers safe, and allow businesses to operate efficiently and economically. This includes the provision of liability protections for our businesses. If business-owners are following reasonable guidelines to protect their employees and their customers, their businesses should not be vulnerable to frivolous lawsuits and the burdensome legal fees they carry with them.

3. **Keep burdensome regulations out of business** – I strongly believe that our greatest asset as a country is our people. The unprecedented breakthroughs reached in our country, both economically and technologically, have been the product of pioneering individuals working hard to ignite innovation and progress. In short, opportunities arise when the government gets out of the way. As our economy rebounds from the coronavirus pandemic, the government needs to support and strengthen our small businesses, not weigh them down with onerous regulations that inhibit progress. Our economic recovery depends on the recovery of our small businesses. And we need to continue to create a business-friendly environment that cuts taxes on small businesses and incentivizes them to continue to grow and develop.

I am proud of the resilient entrepreneurs who have built Houston’s incredible economic legacy and I firmly believe that with the right leadership in Washington, our small businesses will continue to flourish. When we empower hardworking people in Houston, the opportunities are limitless.

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=cc2e3ce4e28a459ab49eb50c758dba62&_e=4aj-YysK-MRrlay_aX3NLj3QzmPN1RTECpqjXzpOrYAlLb7TkucFTedTq6akjSd8F_iI34JAOy_l6O6mz9i1BFIiyJBSdfXKxU2DJ40DyoEWjmjdE0PW-g8OSeasl9MBzqo2fCaIPbr8mKP707rTuJw0XN2U86tz7Hw8EqS4N_OvRIeNOEVSBZoBwQ9-P5PhCzMu-CQ6uZn2DCsiFGObgt8bxDGQH5UIYqUhLnHYDXOYQM0cOkC9OcTEXl83Oh3juEpDjmOy8y5C7v3rqdK5ioRq4jqpbCx7CN2RBOU9YY0%3D)****
---

body:
Progressive Insurgent Cori Bush Will Be A Future Generations Congresswoman! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=359f7ed5ae&e=66979298f9)

| | |
## _CORI BUSH WON!_
---
| Cori, Beth, and Tarra all won their primaries!!!
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=98572dcccf&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| Join us in celebrating Cori Bush's historic win on Tuesday! We can't wait to jump ahead and call her Congresswoman Bush! Cori, an educator and a nurse, has been a civil rights activist advocating for racial justice, police reform, healthcare, and environmental justice her entire life. Her struggles made her stronger and wiser, and the passion that she carries to lift others is immeasurable. Cori is exactly who need in Congress fighting for the People.

Thank you to everyone who volunteered or donated. This win is for all of us!
---
|
> _"I’m honored to receive the endorsement of Future Generations PAC, because they know—like I know—that climate change is a crisis that we have to act swiftly and boldly to address if we want to leave our world habitable for the next generation. We need to fight with everything we’ve got to enact a Green New Deal, and that’s exactly what I plan to do in Congress.”
>
> — **Cori Bush** , Candidate for Congress (MO-01)_
---
|
---
|
#### **BUT WE'RE NOT DONE YET! WE HAD 2 MORE WINS AND THEY'RE HEADED TO THE GENERAL!**

Beth Doglio will be moving on to the General election. Washington is a top 2 state and Beth will need all of our support to come out on top in November. She made the cut by just a few hundred votes, which means that every outreach effort is imperative. We teamed up with Sunrise Movement Tacoma to reach out to voters with media, text banking, and through social media. We know that Future Generations can continue to be the difference between losing and winning an election.
