name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Amanda Makki Wins Chamber of Commerce Straw Poll By Landslide!
body:
| A Message From Amanda Makki For Congress | |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=9e3f4d615b&e=ee1c0329b3)
---
| | **Amanda Makki Wins Tampa Bay Chamber of Commerce
Straw Poll By Landslide**
---
| **St. Petersburg, FL –** Yesterday, the Tampa Bay Chamber of Commerce hosted their virtual political ‘Hob Nob’ event and ended with a straw poll that included Florida’s 13th Congressional race. Overwhelmingly, the pick for voters was Amanda Makki, Republican primary candidate. Amanda Makki received 23% of the vote, while her opponents trailed far behind ranging from 8-0%.

“The Tampa Bay Chamber provides a wonderful opportunity to talk with voters from all over Pinellas County, and some who run businesses here too. Floridians trust President Trump to get our post COVID-19 economy up and running and to have Members of Congress like me who will stand for our President’s agenda. I am excited to have won the straw poll and to be one step closer to winning the Republican Primary and retiring Charlie Crist in November. I will be a strong ally for President Trump in Congress,” said Makki.
---
|
---
| As the Republican frontrunner candidate for Florida’s 13th Congressional District, Amanda Makki has received the endorsements from esteemed military veterans including Representative Lt. General Jack Bergman, the highest-ranking combat Veteran ever to serve in Congress, Senator Joni Ernst, the first female combat Veteran ever elected to the United States Senate, Congressmen Michael Waltz (Lt. Colonel), Congressman Neal Dunn (Major), and combat Veteran Robert O’Neill of the elite Navy SEAL Team 6.

In addition, she is endorsed by House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, Republican Whip Steve Scalise, Health Care Ranking Member and Physician Michael Burgess, as well as Florida Congressional Representatives John Rutherford and Neal Dunn. Locally, Amanda has the support of Seminole City Councilor Thom Barnhorn, Belleair Beach Mayor Joseph Manzo and Treasure Island Commissioner Tyler Payne. She was named to the National Republican Campaign Committee’s Young Guns program as one of the top “Contender” candidates.

Additionally, Amanda has received over 25 major endorsements including The American Conservative Union, the Conservative groups FreedomWorks, Republican Main Street Partnership PAC, and Maverick PAC as well as groups supporting the strongest female candidates in the U.S. including VIEW PAC, Maggie’s List, and Rep. Elise Stefanik’s E‐PAC, that helps female GOP candidates. She is also supported by the American College of Emergency
Physicians and Associated Builders & Contractors Florida Gulf Coast Chapter.
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=7510f43dc3&e=ee1c0329b3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://amandamakki.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6f583b85fa1158c72e40ebde1&id=7510f43dc3&e=ee1c0329b3&c=e3f1f2687c).
---

A new poll released today shows Senator Miller-Meeks ahead of radical Rita Hart by 3 points.

We are building momentum. Just in the last few weeks we have received the endorsement of over 100 Iowa ag leaders and the NFIB. Just this week, the NRCC officially rated our district as one of the most winnable in the country.

Earlier this week, polling showed our race as a dead heat and now we are pulling ahead of our opponent.

We can flip this seat but we need all hands on deck as we enter the home stretch. Will you help us defeat our radical opponent? Austin Harris

name: Team Kathy
subject: NEWSLETTER: Updates from Kathy Manning, Democratic Candidate for NC-06
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Updates from Kathy Manning, Democratic Candidate for NC-06 | |
---

[](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8d4/2423107934/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.kathymanningfornc.com/")

|
---
|
---
| |
---
MESSAGE FROM KATHY
---
Events over the past week remind us how important good and effective leadership is during tough times. Leaders in Washington have failed to reach agreement on extending unemployment benefits and on a much-needed broad relief package. Americans can't wait much longer - we urge the leadership in Washington to move swiftly to reach agreement on a relief package that addresses critical needs of the American people. This week has also brought concerns that the cuts at the US Postal Service may affect the timely delivery of mail-in ballots. We implore the new Postmaster General, Louis DeJoy, who is from our own 6th district, to take the steps necessary to ensure the timely delivery of all ballots, and we urge Congress to provide additional funding required so that voters are not disenfranchised by budget cuts.

|
---

| | |
---
| STATE NEWS
---
Raleigh News & Observer: **[NC Gov Roy Cooper extends Phase Two of coronavirus restrictions into September](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8d5/2423107934/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.newsobserver.com/news/coronavirus/article244737227.html")**
|
---

| | |
---
| NATIONAL NEWS
---
President Trump wants to undermine the election. Here's one way to stop him. [_**READ HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8d2/2423107934/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/president-trump-wants-to-undermine-the-election-heres-one-way-to-stop-him/2020/08/04/66e3366e-d5c7-11ea-9c3b-dfc394c03988_story.html")

|
---

| | |
---
| COVID-19 UPDATE
---

The next federal COVID-19 package must recognize that N.C. and our economy need healthy people. Learn more about how Senate Republicans are failing the nation and the people of North Carolina [_**HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8d3/2423107934/VEsC/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://pulse.ncpolicywatch.org/2020/08/02/the-next-federal-package-must-recognize-n-c-and-our-economy-need-healthy-people/")

|
---

| | |
---
| HOW TO VOTE
---

You can request an absentee ballot for the November election now.

**[Request an absentee ballot from Guilford County](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8d0/2423107934/VEsD/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.guilfordcountync.gov/our-county/board-of-elections/absentee-voting-information/absentee-by-mail-ballot") **or call the Guilford County Board of Elections for more information. Phone: (336) 641-3836 _**[Request an absentee ballot from Forsyth County](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8d1/2423107934/VEsA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://forsyth.lib.nc.us/Elections/Documents/Absentee_Ballot_Request_Form.pdf")**_ or call the Forsyth County Board of Elections for more information. Phone: (336) 703-2800

|
---

| | |
---
| TOWN HALLS
---
Last Thursday we had a zoom event with all four women running for Congress from North Carolina: Pat Timmons Goodson, Kathy Manning, Deb Ross, and Cynthia Wallace. Our special guests were four sitting Congresspeople: Democratic Caucus Chair Hakeem Jeffries, Red to Blue Chair Lisa Blunt Rochester, GK Butterfield and Alma Adams. It was great to have all of us working together and I was honored to be part of the event. **Join Us for the Next Town Hall**
On August 11th, Democratic candidate for Lieutenant Governor Yvonne Holley and I will host a virtual town hall. [_**RSVP here**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8ce/2423107934/VEsB/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/s/rsvp-town-hall-with-rep-yvonne-lewis-holley-kathy-manning") to join our conversation about the future of NC.
|
---

| | |
---
| EDUCATION
---
Rep. Ashton Clemmons advocates for our Public Schools. [_**READ HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8cf/2423107934/VEsO/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://medium.com/@ashtonwheeler/schools-need-funding-now-who-do-we-call-8e59491a38da") Bennett College moves to Online Classes to ensure safety of students and faculty. [_**READ HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8cc/2423107934/VEsP/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://greensboro.com/news/education/we-put-their-health-first-bennett-colleges-president-talks-about-the-schools-virtual-fall-semester/article_154bb292-e728-5bb7-a5c2-807e88293873.html")

|
---

| | |
---
| ECONOMIC RECOVERY
---
N.C. restaurant owners struggle to survive pandemic. **[Smith Street Diner in downtown Greensboro is just one of many to fold.](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8cd/2423107934/VEsHBQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://greensboro.com/business/n-c-restaurant-owners-struggle-to-survive-pandemic-smith-street-diner-in-downtown-greensboro-is/article_769daa11-536f-50a7-84d2-ea867e56f4f9.html")** Interest Rates Are Low, but Loans Are Harder to Get. **[Here's Why.](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8ca/2423107934/VEsHBA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/08/04/your-money/mortgage-loans-credit-cards-coronavirus.html?referringSource=articleShare")**

|
---

| | |
---
| CRIMINAL JUSTICE REFORM
---
Yesterday, **[a video showing the death of John Neville in the Forsyth County Jail was released.](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8cb/2423107934/VEsHBw/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://journalnow.com/news/local/video-of-john-nevilles-treatment-in-forsyth-jail-prompts-demands-for-change-compassion-for-neville/article_08d86743-b480-5c0d-9037-82400e2df9e3.html#2")** Shortly after viewing the video, I joined community leaders and activists in calling for a ban on law enforcement's use of hogtying. Read my full statement [_**HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8c8/2423107934/VEsHBg/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.kathymanningfornc.com/statement-on-law-enforcement-hogtying")

|
---

| | |
---
| SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER
---
Sign up to phone bank for Democratic candidates in NC-06 from home! There will be a training held every Thursday and we're making calls every day. The election is less than 100 days away - get involved today! Sign up [_**HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8c9/2423107934/VEsHAQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.mobilize.us/ncdp/event/278801/")

|
---

| | |
---
| PODCAST RECOMMENDATIONS
---
The Daily: Listen [_**HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8c6/2423107934/VEsHAA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/08/04/podcasts/the-daily/mail-in-voting-president-trump.html") Can He Do That: Listen [_**HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8c7/2423107934/VEsHAw/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.washingtonpost.com/podcasts/can-he-do-that/") The Michelle Obama Podcast: Listen [_**HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8c4/2423107934/VEsHAg/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://open.spotify.com/show/71mvGXupfKcmO6jlmOJQTP?si=DXvSGaPJSJid-jme2Ab-dwutm")

|
---

| | |
---
| WOMEN LEADERS SPEAK OUT
---
Barbara Boxer: DHS was a mistake. I regret voting for it. Boxer was a member of the U.S. House of Representatives from 1983 to 1993 and a member of the U.S. Senate from 1993 to 2017. Here she details her remorse over a vote that Trump is using to terrorize citizens. [_**READ MORE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8c5/2423107934/VEsHDQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.washingtonpost.com/outlook/2020/07/25/barbara-boxer-regret-dhs/") Celebrate the Centennial of Women Gaining the Right To Vote by attending "I am Woman: a Women's Equality Day Centennial on 8/22" by signing up [_**HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8c2/2423107934/VEsHDA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://onlinexperiences.com/scripts/Server.nxp?LASCmd=AI:4;F:QS!10100&ShowUUID=22034F7D-0DA1-4374-B467-4DB05DB73283&Referrer=https://onlinexperiences.com/scripts/Server.nxp%3FLASCmd%3DAI:2;F:AP!18000") Alma Adams has spoken out for people across this District and our State for many years. She is celebrating the silver anniversary of her Mad Hatter event this month. Get yourself a great hat and get ready for the event. For more information, click [_**HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8c3/2423107934/VEsEBQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/madhat?refcode=kathy")

|
---

| | |
---
| WHAT TO DO DURING THE PANDEMIC
---
When You're at Home, You Get to Noticing Things. [_**READ HERE.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8c0/2423107934/VEsEBA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/08/05/at-home/newsletter.html")

|
---

| | |
---
| CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
---
Between now and Election Day I'll be highlighting other candidates who will be on the ballot this fall to ensure everyone has an opportunity to learn more about them. Today, I'm featuring candidates for N.C. Court of Appeals, the state's intermediate appellate court that reviews the proceedings that occurred in trial courts for errors of law or legal procedure.

N.C. COURT OF APPEALS JUDGE SEAT4
Tricia Shields, [https://www.shieldsforjudge.com/](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8c1/2423107934/VEsEBw/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.shieldsforjudge.com/")

N.C. COURT OF APPEALS JUDGE SEAT 5
Lora Christine Cubbage, [www.cubbageforjudge.com/](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8fe/2423107934/VEsEBg/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.cubbageforjudge.com/")

N.C. COURT OF APPEALS JUDGE SEAT 6
Gray Styers, [https://ballotpedia.org/Gray_Styers](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8ff/2423107934/VEsEAQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://ballotpedia.org/Gray_Styers")

N.C. COURT OF APPEALS JUDGE SEAT 7
Reuben F. Young, [https://www.keepjudgeyoung.com/meet-judge-reuben](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8fc/2423107934/VEsEAA/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.keepjudgeyoung.com/meet-judge-reuben")

N.C. COURT OF APPEALS JUDGE SEAT 13
Chris Brook, [https://ballotpedia.org/Christopher_Brook](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d29b/3d199a51/2f553744/7364a8fd/2423107934/VEsEAw/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://ballotpedia.org/Christopher_Brook")

Follow Kathy Online

| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTRkyusDXXZGMdvxOLHoYGSAPyJwa7My4KT_NAuQDNwit0pVaXgltE2yPz2GUuowVH7xB_T1dIyi3lhshWbMT8EDBbCuOfQjrePpiyMJvXwdLjC7FSRS_aqWnLlZaBeM7ntsig6h_Nuko2gc5RYhbFNQ/343/66VnEZugS_SdMWwE3S4DoA/h0/fnYsDxkk95c8398HEqk8lmYlfOwIdp6W5j0azhZ7jBk) Friend — Anthony Joyce put his life on the line for our country, and now Trump is trying to kill him by having him stand in line with COVID patients just to exercise his democratic right to vote. Anthony is a **service member** , a **perennial mail-in voter** , and _**an American who can talk to other voters in a manner that no politician or PAC ever could**_.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkctF7FqMriMATUA7_r36tOSe-ljJBV2s54dcYB7h3zK_AuXHuMSn-se_m-GWCkbKdvOo4hwQLQsfBiEWzZ4szYChrX9GoISF8kWO3pxSNqBiLpxIbAu-1S2jC3mLwJzwEbmxw5cCMIIoDPSSKPbzb6t5bqBDyVZH7XjjWMGyrQXVy60KFxkanW8NH38krA9xwY2Nw1oMo6eXV6mLlECbmInIOTpsaNyhPyVIFPh40KWpW9NF86r3v4mmheVcy9HjWx8zraJAWjM-uiRtfccDQCgBkW-w52jdZ1EHOpUq9UM7vwQZRf4Mnir-Cx8P2PbC1w/343/66VnEZugS_SdMWwE3S4DoA/h1/_z5pPcfwiGunFIVioYPY3dauDA3MiPEua-traQKPcTY) At Defeat Disinfo, we don’t believe in generic political marketing.

We believe in the principal that **a trustworthy source beats an expensive ad campaign any day of the week**. That’s why we’re so focused on sharing the voices of Americans **who look and sound like the voters** that must be reached to flip the White House blue.

Anthony is a service member , a perennial mail-in voter , and an American who can talk to other voters in a manner that no politician or PAC ever could. name: Mike Thompson
subject: continuing his legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [Click here to unsubscribe from Mike's email list
body:
|
---
| | Hi Peter,

We all continue to mourn the loss of a true leader. Congressman John Lewis dedicated his life to ensure equality for all. Without his persistence and activism, many voters wouldn’t have the right to vote, would be racially discriminated against, and actively suppressed from voting.

As one of the 13 original Freedom Fighters, he led the Selma Marches, became a face and leader of the Civil Rights Movement, and was pivotal in passing the Voting Rights Act of 1965 (which was later stripped by the Supreme Court in 2013).

While we still have a long way to go in ensuring equality for all, we must honor his life’s work and restore the Voting Rights Act.

[**_Will you stand with me and demand the Senate restore the Voting Rights Act?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18577924/232874913/-2098055037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWJlZjQxZi0yZGQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZOpNoiYVOCJuJz3hYLDDsIStcREoaP5MuEmkCK8v-4=&emci=2dbef41f-2dd8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=2ebef41f-2dd8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=2678920)
**[Sign on Here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18577925/232874914/-2098055037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWJlZjQxZi0yZGQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZOpNoiYVOCJuJz3hYLDDsIStcREoaP5MuEmkCK8v-4=&emci=2dbef41f-2dd8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=2ebef41f-2dd8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=2678920)**
I am honored to have known Congressman Lewis and I will continue to honor his legacy by fighting for equal rights. Our next step needs to be restoring the Voting Rights Act. Everyone deserves the right to vote.

[**_Help Congressman Lewis’ legacy live on by demanding the Senate pass the Voting Rights Act._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18577926/232874915/-2098055037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWJlZjQxZi0yZGQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZOpNoiYVOCJuJz3hYLDDsIStcREoaP5MuEmkCK8v-4=&emci=2dbef41f-2dd8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=2ebef41f-2dd8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=2678920)

Thank you for your continued support,

Mike Thompson

name: Mike Espy
subject: Why we need to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Espy for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18578039/232878149/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWJlYjJmYi0yZWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xj7D-vNexH8dPblMencPz0L2yGHMLXlXkrGKwaqWamA=&emci=46beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=49beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611)
Folks, Today is an important anniversary in American history: It’s the 55th anniversary of the _Voting Rights Act._ The VRA was hard won by civil rights activists, like our hero Congressman John Lewis, who put their lives on the line to eradicate racial discrimination at the ballot box across the country. It was signed into law five months after the events on ‘Bloody Sunday” in 1965 — where a young John Lewis was nearly beaten to death by state troopers. The VRA prevented state and local governments from discriminating against nonwhite voters, banned literacy tests, and required notoriously oppressive state and local governments to get federal approval before changing their voting laws. Six years ago, however, a Supreme Court decision dismantled a huge part of the VRA and stripped it of its effectiveness. In the last two decades, we’ve seen increased rampant voter suppression take the form of voter ID laws, closed polling places, and more – especially in communities of color. Last year, the House passed a bill that would renew and expand the VRA to actively prevent this kind of voter suppression. But right now it’s being stalled in the Senate, where Mitch McConnell and Cindy Hyde-Smith have refused to bring it up for a vote. There’s no better way to restore the protections of the _Voting Rights Act_ and honor John Lewis’s lifelong fight for voting rights ahead of this year’s critical election than by passing the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act._ [**Add your name to demand the Senate pass the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18578042/232878151/-909056459?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWJlYjJmYi0yZWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xj7D-vNexH8dPblMencPz0L2yGHMLXlXkrGKwaqWamA=&emci=46beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=49beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18578044/232878202/-909056459?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWJlYjJmYi0yZWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xj7D-vNexH8dPblMencPz0L2yGHMLXlXkrGKwaqWamA=&emci=46beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=49beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611)
---
It’s on us to keep up this all important fight, now more than ever, as we’re just three months away from one of the most important elections in our lifetimes, and we continue to see voter suppression from the top-down in our government.
The right to vote is sacred. Let’s give it everything we’ve got to protect it.
– Mike
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18578046/232878210/696843065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWJlYjJmYi0yZWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xj7D-vNexH8dPblMencPz0L2yGHMLXlXkrGKwaqWamA=&emci=46beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=49beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18578048/232878212/344316872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWJlYjJmYi0yZWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xj7D-vNexH8dPblMencPz0L2yGHMLXlXkrGKwaqWamA=&emci=46beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=49beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18578050/232878214/-1017408249?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWJlYjJmYi0yZWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xj7D-vNexH8dPblMencPz0L2yGHMLXlXkrGKwaqWamA=&emci=46beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=49beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18578052/232878216/1468987509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWJlYjJmYi0yZWQ4LWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xj7D-vNexH8dPblMencPz0L2yGHMLXlXkrGKwaqWamA=&emci=46beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=49beb2fb-2ed8-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=11809611)

name: Joe Biden HQ
subject: Had to make sure you saw this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
It's my job to keep close track of Donald Trump's advertising spending |
---
Peter,

As Joe Biden's Director of Paid Media, it's also my job to keep close track of Donald Trump's advertising spending. And as soon as I saw this news, I needed to make sure our grassroots supporters knew, too:

**Donald Trump's campaign spent more than _$5 million last week_ to advertise on Facebook alone.**

I won't sugarcoat it, Peter -- that's a lot of money, and it means Trump is reaching a whole lot of voters every day.

But here's the good news: If you make your first donation today, you can help us fight back. We're still dramatically scaling up the advertising we're doing online, on TV, and in other ways to reach voters where they are, and each and every donation we get right now helps us keep growing those programs even more.

**So Peter, will you help us counter Trump's massive Facebook advertising budget? If you've been waiting to chip in your first $5, or any amount, this would be a really impactful time for you to do so -- it would make a real difference towards getting our own advertising to where it needs to be.**

[**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931baaf/1cd0ac28/17d86463c/357e93ee/3150288085/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931baaf/1cd0ac28/17d86463c/357e93e9/3150288085/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931baaf/1cd0ac28/17d86463c/357e93ec/3150288085/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931baaf/1cd0ac28/17d86463c/357e93e7/3150288085/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

"" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for helping us fight back, Patrick Bonsignore Director of Paid Media Biden for President | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: An honor to be your candidate
body:
Peter,

This week, the Board of Elections concluded its mail-in ballot count and declared a winner in our Primary Election -- and regrettably, this race didn’t go our way. Like you, I’m disappointed that our demands for bold, progressive leadership didn’t prevail this time around. But I’m not giving up, and neither can you.

Even in the face of the tremendous challenges presented by digital campaigning in response to COVID-19, our supporters built the largest grassroots operation that Brooklyn has ever seen, and I’m confident that rather than ending here, we’ve only just laid the groundwork for more people-powered movements to come. I can promise you that, thanks to your dedication, passion, and enthusiasm for delivering real change, our current leaders will think twice before putting PACs and corporate donors above working families -- and if not, then we must continue to hold them accountable and fight for the representation we deserve. And today in particular, on the 55th anniversary of the passage of the Voting Rights Act, we're reminded of how much work remains to be done to achieve true justice and fairness for all.

It’s been an honor to be your candidate, and I truly couldn't be more proud of what we’ve accomplished together. I know that this is only just the beginning, and that our community of organizers, activists, volunteers, and supporters will continue to build a better, brighter future for us all. I’ll be right alongside you, every step of the way.

With gratitude,
Adem

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: battling voter suppression
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
The world lost voting rights champion, John Lewis, less than three weeks ago. As a fellow member of the Ways and Means Committee, John was a friend, colleague, mentor, and inspiration, who fought tirelessly against voter suppression. This is a fight we must still carry on today.
Due to the Supreme Court's Shelby County v. Holder decision in 2013, GOP voter suppression tactics are pervasive. It seems like every election season we hear of unnecessarily strict voter ID laws, voter roll purging, and the intentional closing of polling places -- tactics aimed to keep traditionally Democratic voters away from the polls.
[**Demand Congress restore the _Voting Rights Act_ | SIGN YOUR NAME >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MYVeJ93vD7rpMGMJiEAemvOfREKzRKoK1bCcG2u1Mxc=/rYPw-0zrP6aeyvDuPcHSlKX8A_5STHS6c1OTe9DSJUQ=?code=S%C3%A1nchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_080320_VotingRightsActJA_A)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MYVeJ93vD7rpMGMJiEAemvOfREKzRKoK1bCcG2u1Mxc=/CzuDFqLh8BjMon-LODZQ4IDr-otuXoFh1O1xAOF1k-Q=?code=S%C3%A1nchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_080320_VotingRightsActJA_A)
These tactics are not new. This is why so many leaders of the Civil Rights era like John Lewis fought to help pass the _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ , which made discriminatory voting practices illegal.
The groundwork is there. **Now,** it's up to Congress to restore the _Voting Rights Act_ and protect the rights of voters nationwide.
[**Will you stand with me and the thousands of Americans demanding Congress act now to protect voters?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MYVeJ93vD7rpMGMJiEAemvOfREKzRKoK1bCcG2u1Mxc=/rYPw-0zrP6aeyvDuPcHSlKX8A_5STHS6c1OTe9DSJUQ=?code=S%C3%A1nchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_080320_VotingRightsActJA_A)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MYVeJ93vD7rpMGMJiEAemvOfREKzRKoK1bCcG2u1Mxc=/CzuDFqLh8BjMon-LODZQ4IDr-otuXoFh1O1xAOF1k-Q=?code=S%C3%A1nchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_080320_VotingRightsActJA_A)
Thanks for taking action,
\-- _Linda_ ___S anchez _

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MYVeJ93vD7rpMGMJiEAemvOfREKzRKoK1bCcG2u1Mxc=/QlEibEjlwP5bUZwIcBEWLuocTJEuxJBIATdKzeh7K2A=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/MYVeJ93vD7rpMGMJiEAemvOfREKzRKoK1bCcG2u1Mxc=/394EgIq_NOKIFj5agMtkFgQrItlH9a9PyAzg5A9shsY=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: On to November!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Together we can stop a Nancy Pelosi liberal from representing us in Congress. | | | |
---
| | | Friends,

A big thank you for your tremendous support in the primary. We are both thrilled and humbled to be moving on to the general election in November. It is critical that we unify our efforts so that we hold this seat for the Republican Party.

The choice is clear, a trusted Kansas conservative or a vote for Nancy Pelosi. My opponent in the general has already been endorsed by Elizabeth Warren and taken thousands of dollars from big name liberals like Pete Buttigieg and Amy Klobuchar.

Those people absolutely do not represent our Kansas values. Coastal liberals already bought one vote from Kansas when Sharice Davids won in 2018 and now they are trying the same thing in this district. It’s up to us to close the door on allowing liberal coastal elites to stake a further claim in our state. The Republican Party is strong in the 2nd district and we have what it takes to win!

I look forward to seeing many of you on the campaign trail as we continue to outwork our opponent. Please consider [helping us with a donation to our campaign](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c74303a1d6&e=1050d051da) so that we can keep up the pace. Thank you again! We made it this far with your help and [your continued support](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4bb884cd80&e=1050d051da) will help get us all the way across the finish line in November!

Yours in the fight!

Jake LaTurner

---

name: MJ Hegar
subject: July memo (OFFICIAL)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Do not forward this official campaign memo.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e6f/7f51f7bc/40f8d2ce/4ef79f28/1052380309/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

You're an important part of this team. And as a stakeholder in the campaign, I wanted to make sure you had a chance to read Preston's memo on the state of the race. It's important to me that you stay up to date on how everything is running, so please, read over his message and then **[pitch in to help ensure our win in November.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e6f/7f51f7bc/40f8d2ce/4ef79f2e/1052380309/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.2nd__1860__&amount=10")**

\-- MJ
TO: Campaign Partners
FROM: Preston Elliott, Campaign Manager
RE: The Path to Victory

As we started July, we were in a tight runoff, and Sen. Cornyn had just spent hundreds of thousands of dollars on ads to slow our momentum.

Luckily we had a strong grassroots team to help us fight back. We overcame Sen. Cornyn's meddling, won the runoff, and had our best day of fundraising of the entire campaign. Not only that, but we raised $1 million in the week immediately after the runoff!

Here are some quick stats from the runoff that will be important to keep in mind for the general election:
1. In a runoff election with record-breaking turnout, MJ won 34 of the 36 majority-Hispanic counties across the state.

2. Texas has gained 2 million new voters since 2016, and is adding ~500 new voting age residents every day. These new voters will play a huge role in 2020, and the majority of them are young people, people of color, and women.

3. Sen. Cornyn hasn't made a good impression on Texans; Public Policy Polling found that the majority of Texans either don't know him or don't like him.

4. MJ only has 34% name recognition in that poll, meaning that there is a lot of upward potential if we can get her name out there.

Now that we're in August, the polls are getting tighter, with the latest putting MJ within **one point** of winning, and more people are paying attention to this race.

We are working hard to reach undecided voters in all corners of Texas through volunteer texting and phone banking teams, virtual events, and digital and TV ads.

Winning in November is going to take a lot of work and a whole bunch of resources. We're going to need all of our allies to help out -- so **[please ask everyone you know to donate.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e6f/7f51f7bc/40f8d2ce/4ef79f2e/1052380309/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.2nd__1860__&amount=10")**

This race is getting hotter every day -- that's what I'm seeing as MJ's Campaign Manager. The key takeaway: We won't win without massive support from our grassroots army.

Preston Elliott
Campaign Manager
MJ for Texas

| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e6f/7f51f7bc/40f8d2ce/4ef79f2e/1052380309/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200806.2nd__1860__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e6f/7f51f7bc/40f8d2ce/4ef79f2c/1052380309/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1860&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e6f/7f51f7bc/40f8d2ce/4ef79f23/1052380309/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e6f/7f51f7bc/40f8d2ce/4ef79f22/1052380309/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dana=20Barrett?=
subject: Fifty-five years later.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dana Barrett for Congress**
body:
It seems like every other day, my opponent is in the media explaining why we need to address... |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=44022bc5a2&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | Hey -
Its been fifty-five years since the signing of the Voting Rights Act, protecting minorities from racial discrimination in voting. It's disappointing that today we still see efforts to disenfranchise and suppress the vote of minority communities.

It seems like every other day, my opponent is in the media [explaining why we need to address "Ballot Fraud"](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=fab59dd437&e=e25784ff28). Meanwhile, the current system doesn't even allow everyone in our district to exercise their fundamental rights to vote.
---
|
---
_AP Photo/John Bazemore_
| Whether it be [unexplained voter registration purging](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=3f895f49dc&e=e25784ff28), [six-hour wait times to vote](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=a32418c162&e=e25784ff28), or governor's races won by officials who are in charge of the state's voting process, this disenfranchisement is as unacceptable now as it was 55 years ago.

We can't afford to let them take this election from us, so we need every voter to make sure their vote counts. But first, they need to know that they have a choice that believes in protecting and guaranteeing the right to vote. [Contribute now to help this campaign let voters know that they have a choice for better leadership.](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=9a7579ef17&e=e25784ff28)
---
|

Thank you,
---

| **Dana Barrett**
Democratic Candidate for U.S. Congress

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: Mayor Adrian Perkins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Southerners are hungry for change, and that change is coming.
| | |
---
Friend, I've spent my whole life in the South, so believe me when I tell you: Southerners are hungry for change, and that change is coming.
At this crucial moment, the need for greater, more diverse representation in the halls of Congress has never felt more urgent - as disparities around criminal justice, inequality and health care come into sharp focus. **That's why I couldn't be more excited to have Mayor Adrian Perkins join us in this fight to turn the South blue and take back the Senate for Democrats.**
Adrian is running for Senate in Louisiana to expand affordable health care and make our government work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. He's a graduate of West Point and Harvard Law, fought for our country during three tours of duty with the Army and now serves as mayor of Shreveport, Louisiana's third-largest city. He's a true public servant, and Louisianians across the state deserve his leadership.
**With Adrian and me running, we have a _historic _opportunity to elect Black leaders in the South who will fight for progressive values and give all people a voice in our democracy. But Mitch McConnell and D.C. Republicans are spending big to defeat us, and we need your critical grassroots support to fight back and win our races.**
**[Friend, we're not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so please: Will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and Adrian's to win in Georgia and Louisiana, turn the South blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-perkins?refcode=jtk477-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-perkins?refcode=jtk477-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Adrian and I know what it's like to be counted out. Adrian grew up as the youngest of three boys, raised by a single mother in one of the toughest neighborhoods in Shreveport. I grew up with 11 siblings and lived in public housing on the west side of Savannah. We've faced systemic racism, and we've lived the struggles of working families. Now, we're running for Senate to fight for the communities that helped raise us.
**Election experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight to CNN say that Democrats _can_ take back the Senate - and it could all come down to battleground races like ours. That's why McConnell and the GOP are spending _millions_ to hold us back: They know that if the South turns blue, Republicans lose.**
Voters across the South are fed up with the partisanship and lack of service they see at the top - and they're ready to usher in a new era of moral leadership. We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to finally turn the South blue and take back the Senate for Democrats, but **the _only_ way we can win is if people like you give right here, right now. **
**[That's why I'm making a personal request to you, friend: With the soul of our democracy at stake- and our $25,000 fundraising goal deadline expiring at midnight - will you please split an urgent donation between my campaign and Adrian's to power us to victory and help Democrats take back Senate control?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email-perkins?refcode=jtk477-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you, friend.
Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e2cf/288179be/9465b36/348e3512/897818854/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031
---

Friend — did you hear the big news?

**The Indiana Manufacturers Association (IMA) just endorsed Eric’s reelection campaign!**
**_“Throughout this pandemic, the power of Indiana manufacturing has been on full display, working safely and quickly to produce critical supplies like PPE. Now and always, Hoosier manufacturers are thankful to operate in Indiana, where Governor Holcomb’s leadership has helped build the environment for manufacturers to grow and for Hoosiers to build the skills for great jobs. His leadership has been key to our industry’s continued success – and will continue to be critical in the years ahead. He’s the leader we need, now, and for the next four years.”_**
**_\- Brian Burton, President and CEO of the IMA._**
[**Join the IMA and endorse Eric**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7c704d884ae9400196eaa5528cca96fd&_e=u6thPOfMJYbPmLOxCIQrfleqeySDVNbdbqw1Wv40TRSspbeB2H_YUAYQKfJv11slZEeVDyl9Y06rcZZtGcQMi3oqfVe_PiZSyxcQs_cQh193r6gkjhy-Nlw8f73GM9AtwCJvo9QEmwH6oECObV02jZCy5G47XlytEN76MYnzZBFTEy9Vyml_FpkfaUQbuAJyoceImFSiBwQHD13t9TipgCpt7SQVGtAPWl525fiTBgiTFi_4VbIqoxmkWdy7UqV4UHFd2_Dy5I5ux84YON93QRKKUGRFicuM5m4q4UnA1yVceYyUJU4HC6mR0OMJ9j2IoM1Ax3ne5ZazfzHdYlJs8986suv6givDn6a2LR90ymH6AfYqXWSl0zmwnQ07zEgmt2GpX-aEm1VGk78i9XEDR_vHhhMO5w1Hk2F-XJ1Rnjeo-A5StDV5iQ6omdhJUxacA-rl_RyKCjxnEQaO5JyHSwbnEgU39w4PBtty2auh-tc%3D)
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7c704d884ae9400196eaa5528cca96fd&_e=u6thPOfMJYbPmLOxCIQrfleqeySDVNbdbqw1Wv40TRSspbeB2H_YUAYQKfJv11slZEeVDyl9Y06rcZZtGcQMi3oqfVe_PiZSyxcQs_cQh193r6gkjhy-Nlw8f73GM9AtwCJvo9QEmwH6oECObV02jZCy5G47XlytEN76MYnzZBFTEy9Vyml_FpkfaUQbuAJyoceImFSiBwQHD13t9TipgCpt7SQVGtAPWl525fiTBgiTFi_4VbIqoxmkWdy7UqV4UHFd2_Dy5I5ux84YON93QdiF3aV9euXC8Bg6kNW810paqEc8-ZmnQEyn6ht61hWbUAMTqBEnEoOfny-WEtCZ8bVmeCuhze7CQgrm9K7aLnXmHxgUR6BXZNWrh05IcHmh4WoKbM7CuyYNUbiesp7bBIh7gip38i8fIjLmf5Ul4xiGNA343DyIBGd6FN8fJUM_kZY16mMFWITODWlSOyXOsy3BMijX2ej7NUl-qaPgiHw%3D)
_The IMA represents more than 1,100 Hoosier businesses and is the second oldest manufacturers’ association in the entire country. We couldn’t be more honored to have the support and trust of so many job creators as we navigate through COVID-19 and continue to build One Indiana for All. _

Indiana has the highest concentration of manufacturing jobs in the country, and Eric has worked hand-in-hand with our many Hoosier manufacturing businesses to help safely jumpstart our economy as a part of the Back on Track Plan.
_Since Governor Holcomb assumed office, Indiana has_
* **Set a record with 100,000 new private-sector job commitments**
* **Tripled Indiana’s foreign direct investment over the last three years**
* **Started the Next Level Jobs initiative and helped more than 10,000 Hoosiers earn a credential for a high-wage, in-demand job**

**Here’s what Eric had to say about the endorsement.**
_“Indiana is home to the nation’s highest concentration of manufacturing jobs, and we’re working to keep it that way as our state continues to get back on track. Indiana’s manufacturers produce everything from cars and RVs to vital PPE. But beyond that, they also produce great Hoosier jobs and opportunity as we continue to build One Indiana for All. I thank the Indiana Manufacturers Association for their support as we continue to support our job creators across the state.”_
_\- Governor Eric Holcomb_
If you want to join the our Hoosier manufacturers in supporting Eric’s reelection campaign, use the button below.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: School Edition: Putting Safety First
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot happening this week, and so I wanted to send you our weekly School Edition a day early. Tomorrow, I'll have a special announcement about next week's Facebook Live forum.
Earlier this week, we shared the specific community metrics that will guide our decision-making at the municipal level for getting kids back into the classroom this fall. It is so important to recognize that every town and city has a unique set of circumstances, and we need to be thoughtful and targeted in our reopening plans to meet the needs of every community. Based on the input of our advisory team of health experts, and based on extensive data analysis, we determined that municipalities must have a weekly case incidence rate of fewer than 100 new cases per 100,000 people in order to fully reopen their schools. In other words, if, in the previous week, a city or town had more than 1 new case for every 1,000 residents, then they'll need to go with one of their more limited reopening options rather than bringing back every student.
We were excited to be joined today by Dr. Philip Chan and Dr. Len Mermel. Dr. Chan is an infectious disease specialist for Lifespan and the Consultant Medical Director of the Rhode Island Department of Health's Division of Preparedness, Response, Infectious Disease, and EMS. Dr. Mermel is the Medical Director for the Department of Epidemiology and Infection Control at Rhode Island Hospital. They joined me and Commissioner Infante-Green on Facebook this afternoon to talk about the health precautions schools are taking and our increased testing capacity, both of which are critical to getting students back to the classroom safely this fall.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uxj2FCN7NjiQAcqJFWY0mXDOY7hHkUNLKQkEVTmi30i0ETKICrOLcTHGZLI2pzEBbOv22YeD2f1YnIImZ0nSR2ZPbTKi_fSY9CIF-wVE1iGY0cIQ4NhF-u1gJ5dzT-b-m0lGfRxq7To0-8ZxxONKegqJtzBibn0ffyIDmi-KOT_kcRHui6ODdEfNrCKEmVijGU68DYjj7JU=&c=i9yBMDDOJYVV4Z11V2DALCyIjju3axx4FXRYQCt-euhxSQYVqzQ15w==&ch=YppdDrv5Y7yM6WHpSoeGOvCOR5hq-lumwYlCVB7I5U3HnyVHcRgFwg==)
---
| From our reopening metrics to the detailed plans districts have laid out, I hope Rhode Islanders realize how much time and consideration has gone into this planning process. I want every parent to trust that if, the week of August 16, we say it's safe to go back to school in-person, it's because the science and data say that it's safe and because we've taken steps to significantly mitigate risk. But I believe that parents need to be empowered to make decisions that work best for their families. So I want to be very clear: we are not going to make any Rhode Island parent send their child back to school for in-person learning if they're not comfortable doing so. The Department of Education is working with school districts to ensure they have plans in place to accommodate students who choose distance learning. I hope that this alleviates some anxiety for families during this incredibly stressful time.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uxj2FCN7NjiQAcqJFWY0mXDOY7hHkUNLKQkEVTmi30i0ETKICrOLcUaUwCKDZVu0DOky5FjWE2A9n-BibUvJHkZ7nBJ_A7uIxYNEEmZPyC5SDm4zQD92QSYrqvUPbKhHTIemlOGRcv0mPFmY-lFRl0VNZPJL3x5XV_vb08q3WkquGA63xLmNuUsQBKOQF6JZ9ASwvWnAujU=&c=i9yBMDDOJYVV4Z11V2DALCyIjju3axx4FXRYQCt-euhxSQYVqzQ15w==&ch=YppdDrv5Y7yM6WHpSoeGOvCOR5hq-lumwYlCVB7I5U3HnyVHcRgFwg==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uxj2FCN7NjiQAcqJFWY0mXDOY7hHkUNLKQkEVTmi30i0ETKICrOLcUaUwCKDZVu0DOky5FjWE2A9n-BibUvJHkZ7nBJ_A7uIxYNEEmZPyC5SDm4zQD92QSYrqvUPbKhHTIemlOGRcv0mPFmY-lFRl0VNZPJL3x5XV_vb08q3WkquGA63xLmNuUsQBKOQF6JZ9ASwvWnAujU=&c=i9yBMDDOJYVV4Z11V2DALCyIjju3axx4FXRYQCt-euhxSQYVqzQ15w==&ch=YppdDrv5Y7yM6WHpSoeGOvCOR5hq-lumwYlCVB7I5U3HnyVHcRgFwg==).
---
| P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uxj2FCN7NjiQAcqJFWY0mXDOY7hHkUNLKQkEVTmi30i0ETKICrOLcaKJso_y4uqH7EsQqlrMvlJdLOu4GonOKLNA9u-Gkxldvi8qmL8m1fOYz4FWkY-nMx42D8YFn_jcbs7OGGEipnqnMv61dleAD6LoGg9KOfR5FcP8IpfPyDLL7K_IVCWUcFkLDw13l8EqeffODjihy6uTXiHTZYwKxX9-beYbpyOjrmc8tkF4bUKXJ5_oMX1whotfJIHrk8gXRrd0YohMBRN6pyT_KFqJkbKWsCxU_vfMsAkscZ2iJ8GnmHEWjRsBZfMVKA-wpqqgP_7rb1mwleA=&c=i9yBMDDOJYVV4Z11V2DALCyIjju3axx4FXRYQCt-euhxSQYVqzQ15w==&ch=YppdDrv5Y7yM6WHpSoeGOvCOR5hq-lumwYlCVB7I5U3HnyVHcRgFwg==).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW: President Trump signs executive order to bring drug manufacturing back home
body:
Visiting Ohio today, President Trump just signed an executive order to expand “Made in America” production, bring manufacturing jobs back... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=819898edc6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 6, 2020
---
| | |
# **NEW: President Trump signs executive order to bring drug manufacturing back home**

**Visiting Ohio today,** President Trump just signed an executive order to expand “Made in America” production, bring manufacturing jobs back to the United States, and ensure that our citizens have access to the life-saving medicines they need.

**These actions** come at a crucial time “as we fight this battle against the invisible enemy from China,” White House Director of Trade & Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro says.

**Here are a few things** the new order will accomplish:
* **Establish “Buy American”** rules for Federal Government agencies

* **Strip away regulatory barriers** to domestic pharmaceutical manufacturing

* **Help spark the manufacturing technologies** needed to keep drug prices low and move more medicine production onshore

**President Trump signed** the order today while visiting a Whirlpool manufacturing plant in Clyde, Ohio. This plant represents another important piece of President Trump’s pro-America, pro-worker trade strategy toward China and other countries.

**In January 2018** , the United States challenged years of unfair trade practices by imposing tariffs that stopped washing machine manufacturers, including Whirlpool, from getting undercut by Chinese imports. After President Trump took action, Whirlpool’s Clyde plant alone was able to create 200 new jobs for U.S. workers.

**“Washington stood idly by** as other countries engaged in unfair trade practices, such as massive subsidies, currency manipulation, and . . . the wholesale dumping of foreign-made products sold below cost for the sole purpose of driving you out of business” so they could later jack up prices, President Trump told workers today.

🎬 [**President Trump: “But we didn’t let that happen, did we?”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ff99f827a3&e=3ee4985eea)

**Today’s executive order** directs the Department of Health and Human Services to use the Defense Production Act to buy essential medicines and other equipment from within the United States. Drug prices will be kept low for customers, and American companies will be able to compete more fairly on the world stage as a result.

**In addition, the FDA** and the Environmental Protection Agency will now give priority to domestic manufacturers during the regulatory review of pharmaceutical ingredients and essential medicines. Federal agencies will also help prevent the trafficking of counterfeit medicines from third-party sellers online.

**“It’s a great day for America** ,” Navarro said.**** “The President has promised that he would bring home the supply chains in production for our essential medicines, and today we're taking a very big step towards fulfillment of that promise.”

🎬 [**Peter Navarro: It’s important to bring our supply chains home**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=523b0ae09d&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump has long** made returning blue-collar jobs to America a top priority. Now, the Coronavirus pandemic has made even clearer the risks of becoming reliant on foreign nations for our essential supplies. Fortunately, more than any other president in history, President Trump is a fearless advocate for both buying and hiring American.

**As a result,** his list of trade accomplishments keeps growing. NAFTA is gone, replaced by a far stronger United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement. China and its enablers on the global stage are at last being held accountable. Trade agreements with South Korea, Japan, and others have been renegotiated to protect American jobs and customers.

**“Globalization has made** the financial elites who donate to politicians very wealthy, but it’s left millions and millions of our workers with nothing but poverty and heartache—and our towns and cities with empty factories and plants,” President Trump said.

**“We’ve made extraordinary progress** in reversing the dangerous tide of globalism.”

🎬 [**WATCH: Our vision to bring millions of jobs back to U.S. soil**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=393b506b98&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ IT:[_President Trump orders Government to buy American!_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=259d393b4f&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump boards Air Force One at Joint Base Andrews before departing for Ohio **| August 6, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57f55e020e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=58c4c788a0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=71e2570e8e)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Thank You, Team Hagerty!
body:
Peter,Thank you for your continued support. My family and I greatly appreciate it.The polls are open now, and I wanted to make sure you are up to date on Team Hagerty's efforts to send a true Trump conservative to the United States Senate to fight for Tennesseans alongside Senator Marsha Blackburn.Since I announced my campaign last September, Team Hagerty has made over 2 million personal voter contacts to Tennesseans through conversations at the door, phone calls, personal text messages, handwritten notes and more.Today, we released a video featuring all of the hard work Team Hagerty has done to share our vision for the state. I am beyond thankful for your support and help.**Watch "Thank You, Team Hagerty" [HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phttykl-fuutjhhtj-r/)** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phttykl-fuutjhhtj-y/) Make sure you get out and vote if you haven't already! The polls close in less than 12 hours! We have built a fantastic team, and I am so thankful for your continued support. Bill Hagerty Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phttykl-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phttykl-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phttykl-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phttykl-fuutjhhtj-d/)

name: Protect Our Public Lands (via protectvoting.org)
subject: Missing your name: Stop Trump NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035f/72412298/4b29a4cc/610671d8/3933839670/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2")

| | **Peter, Donald Trump is at it again. He 's hand-picked a Bureau of Land Management nominee whose SOLE goal will be to DESTROY our public lands to benefit the President's special interests and pet projects:** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035f/72412298/4b29a4cc/610671db/3933839670/VEsE/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/pendley/vpp/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2") | | | [Reject Pendley's Nomination -> ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035f/72412298/4b29a4cc/610671da/3933839670/VEsF/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/pendley/vpp/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Reject+Pendleyrsquos+Nomination+rarr+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2")
---
Pendley's nominated to oversee **all** federal lands -- _tasked with protecting and preserving 250 million acres of PRISTINE PUBLIC lands._
But, we have a SNEAKING suspicion that won't be his goal if he nabs the position... **He 's tweeted that the president can sell public lands in order to fund the border wall?!** And that isn't his only view that's alarming:
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035f/72412298/4b29a4cc/610671dd/3933839670/VEsC/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/pendley/vpp/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2")
_We can 't let this man who has spent his career undermining public land protections oversee our public lands -- in his time as Acting Director, he's already allowed logging, mining, and fossil fuel interests to overtake our public lands._**[Tell the Senate to reject William Pendley's nomination TODAY ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035f/72412298/4b29a4cc/610671dc/3933839670/VEsD/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/pendley/vpp/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Tell+the+Senate+to+reject+William+Pendle&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2")**
| | [Reject Pendley! ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035f/72412298/4b29a4cc/610671df/3933839670/VEsA/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/pendley/vpp/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Reject+Pendley+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2")
---
Donald Trump keeps propping up extremists that are destroying our country at every turn. We can't let another one hold onto power. We must act now to protect our public lands TODAY!
Thank you for taking action,
The Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d035f/72412298/4b29a4cc/610671de/3933839670/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200806_PendleyJA_U2_X2")

name: Joe Biden
subject: Peter, I'm missing your answers for our Beat Trump Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Please take a minute to fill it out. |
---
Peter, I've said this since the beginning: Beating Donald Trump in November will not be easy.

But it's necessary. The urgency of beating him, of preventing him from altering the very fabric of our nation if given four more years, is why I made the choice to run for president last year.

And it's on full display now as Americans are asked to rise to an occasion and their courage and leadership is not even mirrored by their president.

So I need your help, Peter. We released a survey earlier this year asking our team to weigh in on some strategy. This is not a normal election and Donald Trump is not a normal opponent, so we need some more ideas in our "Beat Trump Survey."

[**My report here says we don 't have your answers on this survey yet, you could have taken it on another email so you can disregard if that's the case. But if you think you may not have taken it yet, I'd really appreciate it if you could take a minute to fill it out.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea747/486131148/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/beat-trump-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.04.24_B2_beattrump_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.04.24_B2_beattrump_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners_RS")

**You can fill out the Beat Trump Survey here:** | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea747/486131148/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/beat-trump-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.04.24_B2_beattrump_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.04.24_B2_beattrump_X__F1_S1_C1__nonsigners_RS")
---
We'll be closing the survey soon to use the results for our strategy sessions, so I wanted to reach out one last time to ask you to fill it out.

I hope you'll take some time today to share your thoughts,

Joe Biden
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea746/486131148/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea745/486131148/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea744/486131148/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea743/486131148/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea742/486131148/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea741/486131148/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea740/486131148/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea73f/486131148/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea73e/486131148/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea73d/486131148/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea740/486131148/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea73c/486131148/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea73f/486131148/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931babb/1cd0ac28/17dd897c7/357ea73b/486131148/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President
clean_body: Please take a minute to fill it out. | Peter, I've said this since the beginning: Beating Donald Trump in November will not be easy. But it's necessary. The urgency of beating him, of preventing him from altering the very fabric of our nation if given four more years, is why I made the choice to run for president last year. And it's on full display now as Americans are asked to rise to an occasion and their courage and leadership is not even mirrored by their president. So I need your help, Peter. We released a survey earlier this year asking our team to weigh in on some strategy. This is not a normal election and Donald Trump is not a normal opponent, so we need some more ideas in our "Beat Trump Survey." "" You can fill out the Beat Trump Survey here: | "" We'll be closing the survey soon to use the results for our strategy sessions, so I wanted to reach out one last time to ask you to fill it out. I hope you'll take some time today to share your thoughts, Joe Biden | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Ellen Foster
subject: Trump attacked Jon last night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
He's terrified of Jon winning in Georgia. |
---
**Friend, Donald Trump attacked Jon Ossoff last night.**

**During a self-congratulatory Georgia tele-rally last night to boost his own chances in Georgia and save the campaign of his "favorite Senator," David Perdue,_Trump took some time to talk about Jon_.**

Trump called Jon "super liberal" and "uh, not much," and speculated he was "going to be totally controlled by Schumer."

OK.

Trump also showered Perdue with praise, calling him an "incredible Senator," a "fantastic man," and an "idol to many."

**Friend, it's so clear: Trump and GOP are ABSOLUTELY TERRIFIED of Jon winning in Georgia.**

Jon is NECK AND NECK in the polls with Perdue -- and if Jon wins, Democrats will take control of the U.S. Senate.

**Georgia is 2020's top battleground state, and no amount of Trump visits or tele-rallies will stop Democrats from winning here this November.**

**[Trump thinks he can reverse our momentum here in Georgia ... by calling Jon "uh, not much." He can't. Chip in $20 to help us fight back>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2767/5b2c1286/3e915352/25f1d6ea/2649776281/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_06_dt_at_jo?refcode=em_2020_08_06_dt_at_jo&amount=20")**

Trump and Perdue think a few rallies will make Georgians ignore their failed leadership.

**The people of Georgia know exactly who Trump and Perdue have been looking out for in office -- and it's not them.**

With almost 160,000 Americans dead and Georgia now over 200,000 COVID-19 cases, Trump and Perdue continue to downplay the coronavirus pandemic, which they both have said is "going very well."

**Now, Trump and Perdue, both of whom are multi-millionaires, think an extra $600 a week is too much for unemployed workers.**

**_And amid millions of Georgians filing jobless claims in the last six months, Trump actually bragged about the state's unemployment numbers during the tele-rally._**

Trump and Perdue have no record to run on, and they're falling in the polls. So the GOP is opening up its war chest to stop Democrats from winning in Georgia.

_Mitch McConnell's super PAC just committed another $6.6 million to Georgia. That's over $30 million so far of outside money into the state!_

The people of Georgia deserve new leadership.

**[Make a donation right now to show Trump and Perdue that we're going to elect Georgia Democrat Jon Ossoff this November.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2767/5b2c1286/3e915352/25f1d6f3/2649776281/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_06_dt_at_jo?refcode=em_2020_08_06_dt_at_jo")**

Ellen Foster

| Dear Friend,

We have some good news and some bad news.

We just got word that RMG Research conducted a poll in CA-53. It's one of the first independent polls of the general election and says a lot about how people are feeling with just 89 days left until Election Day.

_The good news:_ The poll shows Sara up by **15 points** over our opponent!

_The bad news:_ **51 percent** of voters are still undecided.
